title: Rizla Regular Blue Rolling Paper - Full Box Of 100 Booklets
features: Rizla Regular Blue Rolling Paper - Full Box Of 100 Booklets In Stock And Available
Blue is a thinner paper and takes more skill to roll than Green. Once mastered, however, you can experience a slower burn

Rizla Blue is ideal for the more refined rollers. Lightweight and with a higher taste intensity, Blue Rizla papers are trickier to roll for beginners, but offer a rewarding finish. Coming in standard size and made from a rice and flax blend, Blue Rizla are a popular choice.
description: Product Description Rizla Blue 100pks Box Contains Rizla Blue
